name: trasporto-urbano-bari-skill
description: Alexa Custom Skill it-IT per il trasporto urbano AMTAB di Bari

scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cp=require('child_process');function walk(dir){for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){const full=path.join(dir,entry.name);if(entry.isDirectory())walk(full);else if(full.endsWith('.js'))cp.execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',full],{stdio:'inherit'});}}walk('.');"
